category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides tools for human-editable plain text data files; GNU Recutils homepage describes recfiles as text-based databases.
display_name_sources: Official GNU project page and manual use GNU Recutils as the project name; source_facts.name is recutils.
docs_sources: Official GNU Recutils page links to the online documentation and manual.
repo_sources: Official GNU Recutils page directs development sources to the Savannah project; Savannah cgit is the official GNU source repository browser.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies plain-text data-file tools; GNU manual describes recfiles and command-line utilities.
